rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Simple file edits can fail silently — previous commit only touched skill files and artifacts, leaving README.md untouched despite planning to edit it.","scope":"README.md"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a task says 'modify X', the fix must literally modify X on disk. Verify with `git diff` or file read before assuming the edit succeeded.","scope":"file modification"}]}
